= Contents =
  - [[#DJANGO|DJANGO]]
      - [[#DJANGO#localization|localization]]
        - [[#DJANGO#localization#make/update localization files|make/update localization files]]
      - [[#DJANGO#migrations|migrations]]
        - [[#DJANGO#migrations#makemigrations|makemigrations]]
        - [[#DJANGO#migrations#migrate|migrate]]

= DJANGO =

=== localization ===

==== make/update localization files ====
* create/update `.po` files
{{{
  django-admin makemessages -l 
}}}
* edit them in `Poedit`
* compile `.mo` files
{{{
  django-admin compilemessages 
}}}

=== migrations ===
			
==== makemigrations ====
{{{
   ./manage.py makemigrations
 }}}
==== migrate ====
{{{
   ./manage.py migrate
 }}}
